Container.Name: Garage-WebUI
Container.Overview: Web UI for Garage object storage. This is an administrative interface for managing buckets, keys, and layout against a Garage instance.

Config.Name: Garage Config File
Config.Description: Garage configuration file used by the Web UI.

Config.Name: Garage Config Path
Config.Description: Path to the mounted Garage config file inside the container.

Config.Name: Garage Admin API URL
Config.Description: Optional Garage admin API URL. The UI can usually infer this from the config file.

Config.Name: Garage Admin API Key
Config.Description: Optional Garage admin API key. Only needed if the UI fails to load it from the config file.

Config.Name: Garage S3 Endpoint URL
Config.Description: Optional Garage S3 endpoint URL. The UI can usually infer this from the config file.

Config.Name: Garage S3 Region
Config.Description: Optional S3 region. The UI can usually infer this from the config file.

Config.Name: UI Auth User:Hash
Config.Description: Optional auth in the format username:bcrypt_hash. Generate with htpasswd -nbBC 10 username password.

Config.Name: UI Base Path
Config.Description: Optional base path/prefix if serving the Web UI behind a reverse proxy subpath.
